---
title: "googlemaps"
output: html_document
date: "2024-02-18"
---
```{r}
library(dismo)

coords <- read.table(here("data", "Scelop.coord"))
coords_longlat <- st_as_sf(coords, coords = c("V1", "V2"), crs = "+proj=longlat") 
coords_proj <- st_transform(coords_longlat, crs = 3085)
plot(coords_proj)

m <- gmap()
```
